Title: Renames the Governor Mario M. Cuomo bridge the Lieutenant Michael P. Murphy Tappan Zee bridge
Summary: Renames the Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge the Lieutenant Michael P. Murphy Tappan Zee Bridge; directs the commissioner of transportation to provide for the installation and maintenance of adequate signage of the state highway system.
LawCode: Amd §356, Pub Auth L; amd §§13-0103 & 13-0307, En Con L; amd §§342-ww & 349-a, Hway L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public authorities law, the environmental conservation law and the highway law, in relation to renaming the Governor Mario M. Cuomo bridge to the Lieutenant Michael P. Murphy Tappan Zee bridge
